title: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor
tagline: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor, Kerala

overview.short: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor, popularly known as Sampaloor Palli, is a pilgrim centre coming under the Diocese of Kottapuram of the Archdiocese of Verapoly. It is situated along Palayamparambu Road, at Sampaloor, Mala in Thrissur district of the south Indian state of Kerala. The church is best known for hosting a number of Christian saints and missionaries including Francis Xavier, John de Britto, Arnos Pathiri and Constanzo Beschi.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kadukutty
topPlaces.description: Kadukutty is a village and Gram panchayat in the Chalakudy block in the Thrissur district, state of Kerala, India. It is surrounded by the Chalakudy river on three sides.

topPlaces.name: Vynthala Lake
topPlaces.description: Vynthala Lake (Malayalam: വൈന്തല തടാകം) is a natural oxbow lake found in Vynthala, near Mala, Thrissur District of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ashtamichira
topPlaces.description: Ashtamichira is a village in Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. The vast paddy fields and coconut groves that surround Ashtamichira represent the core strength of the area, which is agriculture.

topPlaces.name: Annallur
topPlaces.description: Annallur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located about 33 kilometres (20 miles) from the Thrissur Municipal Corporation and 18 kilometres (11 miles) from the sub-district headquarters of Irinjalakuda.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Perpetual Help Church, West Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: The Church of the Our Lady of Perpetual Help, popularly known as Nithyasahaya Matha Palli or Moonjeli Palli is a parish church coming under the Syro-Malabar Catholic Eparchy of Irinjalakuda. It is situated along the Chalakudy - Ashtamichira Road, about 1 km from Chalakudi railway station at a small hamlet by name, Munjeli, in the south Indian state of Kerala.

image.alt: Our Lady of Perpetual Help Church, West Chalakudy

topPlaces.name: Karoor
topPlaces.description: Karoor is a village in Kodakara Panchayath in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. Karoor is located 30 km from the city of Thrissur and 12 km from Irinjalakuda Town and 8 km from Chalakudy Town and 8 km from Mala, Kerala Town.

topPlaces.name: Annamanada
topPlaces.description: Annamanada is a village in a southern corner of Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Mala, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Mala is a small town in Thrissur district of Kerala state, India. There is a Jewish synagogue in Mala town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor?
faq.a: Stays in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Sampaloor?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadukutty, Vynthala Lake, Ashtamichira, Annallur, Our Lady of Perpetual Help Church, West Chalakudy.
